Card Text: Deal 6 damage.
Upgraded Text: Deal 9 damage.
Notes: Starting card. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Gain 5 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block.
Notes: Starting card. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Channel 1 Lightning.
Upgraded Text: Channel 1 Lightning. Costs 0.
Notes: Starting card. Upgrade makes it free. Keep until late game.

Card Text: Evoke your rightmost orb twice.
Upgraded Text: Evoke your rightmost orb twice. Costs 0.
Notes: Starting card. Upgrade is important. Evokes for big damage/block.

Card Text: Ethereal. The first card you play each turn is played an additional time.
Upgraded Text: The first card you play each turn is played an additional time.
Notes: THE GOAT. Best card in class. Double powers, double attacks. Upgrade removes Ethereal.

Card Text: Gain 2 orb slots.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 orb slots.
Notes: More orb slots = more scaling. Works with temp focus. One copy solves endgame.

Card Text: Gain 1 Focus.
Upgraded Text: Gain 2 Focus.
Notes: Made rare in STS2. Permanent focus = permanent scaling. Still best focus card.

Card Text: Channel 1 Frost for each enemy. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Channel 1 Frost for each enemy.
Notes: 0-cost AoE block setup. Disgusting in multi-enemy fights. Upgrade removes Exhaust.

Card Text: Gain 6 Block. Channel 2 Frost.
Upgraded Text: Gain 9 Block. Channel 2 Frost.
Notes: Nerfed -1 block from STS1. Still S tier. 2 Frost = permanent block engine.

Card Text: Channel 1 Frost. Draw 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Channel 1 Frost. Draw 2 cards.
Notes: Best common. Frost + draw. Upgrade is insane. Click on sight.

Card Text: Gain 1 Block. Permanently increase this card's block by 3.
Upgraded Text: Gain 4 Block. Permanently increase this card's block by 3.
Notes: Scales through run. Early = insane late game block. Combo with Echo Form.

Card Text: Gain 2 Focus this turn. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain 3 Focus this turn.
Notes: Best temp focus card. 0-cost. Loop multiple copies. Upgrade removes Exhaust. NERFED: now exhausts.

Card Text: Channel 1 Dark. Trigger the passive of all Dark orbs.
Upgraded Text: Channel 1 Dark. Trigger the passive of all Dark orbs twice.
Notes: Way better than STS1. Boss killer. Dark orbs solve damage. Upgrade triggers twice.

Card Text: Gain 1 orb slot. Draw 1 card. Increase this card's cost by 1.
Upgraded Text: Gain 1 orb slot. Draw 2 cards. Increase this card's cost by 1.
Notes: Free orb slot + draw. Play twice is still worth it. Disgusting.

Card Text: Gain 2 Focus this turn for each unique orb you have. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain 2 Focus this turn for each unique orb you have.
Notes: With diverse orbs = 4-8 focus. Works with Capacitor/Modded. Upgrade removes Exhaust.

Card Text: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Block for each unique orb you have.
Upgraded Text: At the start of your turn, gain 3 Block for each unique orb you have.
Notes: Passive block every turn. With 3-4 orb types = never take damage. Easy setup.

Card Text: Gain 4 energy. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain 5 energy. Exhaust.
Notes: 0-cost, 4 energy, exhausts. Play all your powers. Chain with Coolheaded. How other characters should work.

Card Text: Innate. Gain 10 Block. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Innate. Gain 13 Block. Exhaust.
Notes: 0-cost 10 block turn 1. Lets you set up. Gets out of deck. Click in Act 1.

Card Text: Prevent the next time you would lose HP.
Upgraded Text: Prevent the next 2 times you would lose HP.
Notes: Store block for setup turns. Less needed without Heart. Still great vs big attacks.

Card Text: Gain 7 Block. Next turn, gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: Gain 9 Block. Next turn, gain 1 energy.
Notes: Premium block common. Blocks + energy next turn. Never falls off.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage. Channel 1 Frost.
Upgraded Text: Deal 9 damage. Channel 1 Frost.
Notes: Damage + Frost. Basically deal 6, block 2+ forever. Great early.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage for each channeled orb.
Upgraded Text: Deal 6 damage for each channeled orb.
Notes: Buffed from 4 to 5. With orb slots = massive damage. Common scaling option.

Card Text: Deal 9 damage. Gain 1 Focus this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 11 damage. Gain 2 Focus this turn.
Notes: Temp focus at common! Damage + scaling. Click on sight.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage. If fewer than 3 cards played, draw 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage. If fewer than 3 cards played, draw 1 card.
Notes: 0-cost damage + draw. Don't take with Echo Form (doubling FTL < doubling drawn card).

Card Text: Deal 3 damage. If enemy intends to attack, apply 1 Weak.
Upgraded Text: Deal 4 damage. If enemy intends to attack, apply 2 Weak.
Notes: 0-cost Weak. Defect's only Weak source. Works with passive block. Always solid.

Card Text: Lose 1 orb slot. Gain 2 Strength. Gain 2 Dexterity.
Upgraded Text: Lose 1 orb slot. Gain 3 Strength. Gain 3 Dexterity.
Notes: Reprogram replacement. Lose orb slot often doesn't matter. Dex = block. Great early.

Card Text: Gain 5 Block. Channel 1 Glass.
Upgraded Text: Gain 7 Block. Channel 1 Glass.
Notes: Block + AoE damage orb. Glass ticks down but evokes for big AoE. Solves AoE fights.

Card Text: At end of turn, if you have Frost, deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: At end of turn, if you have Frost, deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: You always have Frost. 6 AoE every turn. Good early.

Card Text: Gain 3 Block. Put a card from discard into your hand. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain 4 Block. Put a card from discard into your hand. Exhaust.
Notes: Block + retrieval. Get back temp focus, Boot Sequence, etc. Don't overpick.

Card Text: At start of turn, trigger rightmost orb's passive.
Upgraded Text: At start of turn, trigger rightmost orb's passive twice.
Notes: Basically extra orb slot. Less good without permanent focus but still scaling.

Card Text: Deal 10 damage. Apply 2 Weak. Channel 1 Dark.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. Apply 2 Weak. Channel 1 Dark.
Notes: Damage + Weak + Dark. Kills bosses. Never falls off.

Card Text: Gain 11 Block. Channel 1 Dark.
Upgraded Text: Gain 14 Block. Channel 1 Dark.
Notes: Premium block + Dark. Block while Dark cooks. Great early and late.

Card Text: Deal 11 damage to ALL enemies. Evoke all your orbs.
Upgraded Text: Deal 14 damage to ALL enemies. Evoke all your orbs.
Notes: 11 AoE + evoke all. Early game clear. Evoking orbs is often good (block/damage).

Card Text: Deal 24 damage. If this kills, gain 3 energy.
Upgraded Text: Deal 28 damage. If this kills, gain 3 energy.
Notes: Pseudo-AoE. Kill + refund. Great in hallways. Falls off vs bosses.

Card Text: Double your energy. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Costs 0. Double your energy. Exhaust.
Notes: 3 → 6 energy. Upgrade to 0 is disgusting. Play with powers/Coolheaded.

Card Text: At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.
Upgraded Text: At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards.
Notes: Extra draw helps line up Hot Fix. Long fights = lots of value.

Card Text: Evoke your rightmost orb 4 times.
Upgraded Text: Evoke your rightmost orb 4 times. Costs 0.
Notes: Ancient. Evoke 4x = 20+ block or massive Dark damage. Gross.

Card Text: Deal 19 damage. Channel 3 Frost.
Upgraded Text: Deal 22 damage. Channel 3 Frost.
Notes: 3 Frost is a lot. Expensive but front loads block. Works with Hot Fix.

Card Text: Channel Lightning equal to Lightning channeled this combat. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Channel Lightning equal to Lightning channeled this combat.
Notes: Lightning archetype payoff. Goes exponential. Boss killer. Upgrade removes Exhaust.

Card Text: Deal 10 damage. Put all 0-cost cards from discard into your hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 14 damage. Put all 0-cost cards from discard into your hand.
Notes: Claw archetype payoff. Better in STS2. Draw-order dependent but strong.

Card Text: At start of turn, add a random Power to your hand. Costs 0.
Upgraded Text: At start of turn, add a random Power to your hand. Costs 0.
Notes: Slow scaling. Random powers. Can print Echo Form. Setup required.

Card Text: Deal 18 damage. Add a 0-cost copy to discard.
Upgraded Text: Deal 21 damage. Add a 0-cost copy to discard.
Notes: Early game damage. Slow scaling. Falls off but solid Act 1.

Card Text: Deal 7 damage. Channel 1 Lightning.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Channel 1 Lightning.
Notes: Damage + Lightning. Less needed than STS1 but still solid early.

Card Text: Gain 9 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 12 Block.
Notes: Big block number. Worse than Charge Battery (no energy next turn). Fine early.

Card Text: Gain 4 Block for the next 3 turns. Channel 1 Lightning.
Upgraded Text: Gain 6 Block for the next 3 turns. Channel 1 Lightning.
Notes: Slow block + Lightning. Defect's Iron Wave. Decent early.

Card Text: Deal 24 damage. Channel 3 Plasma.
Upgraded Text: Deal 30 damage. Channel 3 Plasma.
Notes: 5 energy! Energy positive if you evoke. Can go infinite. Hard to play without setup.

Card Text: Draw 3 cards.
Upgraded Text: Draw 4 cards.
Notes: Draw + 0-cost cards = good. Less needed than STS1 but still solid.

Card Text: Deal 3 damage. Trigger all Lightning against the enemy.
Upgraded Text: Deal 5 damage. Trigger all Lightning against the enemy.
Notes: 0-cost. Works with temp focus to scale Lightning. Early damage.

Card Text: Gain 2 energy. Add a Void to discard.
Upgraded Text: Gain 2 energy. Add a Void to discard.
Notes: Burst energy. Void exhausts. Bridges into status cards. Common energy gen.

Card Text: Gain 13 Block. Add 2 Wounds to discard.
Upgraded Text: Gain 16 Block. Add 2 Wounds to discard.
Notes: Power Through on Defect. Status synergy. Worse in STS2 (second cycle matters).

Card Text: Deal 7 damage. Draw 1 card per unique orb.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Draw 1 card per unique orb.
Notes: With Glass orbs = more draws. B tier but can enable stuff.

Card Text: Deal 13 damage. Draw 1 card. If status created, costs 0 this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 14 damage. Draw 2 cards. If status created, costs 0 this turn.
Notes: Status payoff. 0-cost draw. BUFFED: cost reduction lasts until played.

Card Text: First time you draw a status each turn, draw 2 cards.
Upgraded Text: First time you draw a status each turn, draw 3 cards.
Notes: Status synergy. Evolve but limited. Need status gen.

Card Text: Shuffle all cards into draw pile. Draw 4 cards. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Shuffle all cards into draw pile. Draw 6 cards. Exhaust.
Notes: Reset bad draws. Find Hot Fix. Don't use if hunting specific power.

Card Text: Whenever you play a Power, gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: Costs 0. Whenever you play a Power, gain 1 energy.
Notes: Power spam = energy. Worse without Heat Sinks. Upgrade to 0 is nice.

Card Text: Whenever you evoke Lightning, deal 6 damage to each enemy hit.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you evoke Lightning, deal 8 damage to each enemy hit.
Notes: +6 focus on Lightning evokes. Boss damage. Needs Lightning setup.

Card Text: Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies. Draw 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Deal 9 damage. Draw 1 card.
Notes: AoE + draw. 6 AoE matters in STS2. Fine common.

Card Text: At start of turn, channel 1 Glass.
Upgraded Text: At start of turn, channel 1 Glass.
Notes: Free Glass each turn. AoE over time. Good early.

Card Text: Deal 9 damage twice. Channel 2 Glass.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage twice. Channel 2 Glass.
Notes: 18 single + 8 AoE via Glass evoke. Early game strong. 3 energy awkward.

Card Text: Channel 1 Lightning, 1 Frost, 1 Dark. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Channel 1 Lightning, 1 Frost, 1 Dark.
Notes: Jack of all trades. Diverse orbs for Synchronize/Coolant. Dark for bosses.

Card Text: Next Power you play is played an additional time. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Next Power you play is played an additional time. Exhaust.
Notes: Amplify but saves across turns. Double Echo Form. Less needed in STS2.

Card Text: Deal 3 damage. Increase all Claw damage by 2 this combat.
Upgraded Text: Deal 5 damage. Increase all Claw damage by 2 this combat.
Notes: Meme card. C tier stands for Claw. Better in STS2 but still niche.

Card Text: Deal 3 damage. Apply 1 Vulnerable.
Upgraded Text: Deal 3 damage. Apply 2 Vulnerable.
Notes: 0-cost Vuln. Only good in Claw decks. Orbs don't use Vuln.

Card Text: Gain 4 Focus. At start of turn, lose 1 Focus.
Upgraded Text: Gain 5 Focus. At start of turn, lose 1 Focus.
Notes: Ancient only. No Artifact to negate. Temp focus is plentiful. Less needed.

Card Text: Deal 26 damage to ALL enemies. Lose 3 Focus.
Upgraded Text: Deal 32 damage to ALL enemies. Lose 3 Focus.
Notes: Can't negate focus loss. Farm Act 1. Falls off in bosses. Carefully timed.

Card Text: Draw 2 cards. Add a Burn to discard.
Upgraded Text: Draw 3 cards. Add a Burn to discard.
Notes: Draw but Burn hurts second cycle. Less needed without power spam.

Card Text: Exhaust a card. Next turn, gain 2 energy.
Upgraded Text: Exhaust a card. Next turn, gain 3 energy.
Notes: Nerfed Recycle. Energy next turn is clunky. Status deck only.

Card Text: Gain 6 Block. Transform all statuses in hand into Fuel.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block. Transform all statuses in hand into Fuel.
Notes: Status cleanse + block. Fuel gives energy/draw. Needs status gen.

Card Text: Add a random Power to hand. Costs 0 this turn. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Costs 0. Add a random Power to hand. Costs 0 this turn. Exhaust.
Notes: Random power can be Echo Form or garbage. Desperation pick.

Card Text: Channel X Lightning.
Upgraded Text: Channel X Lightning. Deal X damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: X-cost Lightning spam. Glass orbs are easier AoE. Energy hungry.

Card Text: Deal 12 damage. Next Power costs 0.
Upgraded Text: Deal 15 damage. Next Power costs 0.
Notes: Energy cheat but damage number is low. 12 isn't enough.

Card Text: Evoke rightmost orb X times.
Upgraded Text: Evoke rightmost orb X+1 times.
Notes: Dark/Plasma only. Worse Dual Cast usually. Energy hungry.

Card Text: Exhaust all statuses. Deal 8 damage per status exhausted to random enemy.
Upgraded Text: Exhaust all statuses. Deal 10 damage per status exhausted to random enemy.
Notes: Status payoff. Needs heavy status gen. Niche.

Card Text: Channel 1 Plasma.
Upgraded Text: Channel 1 Plasma. Costs 1.
Notes: Plasma = energy. 2 cost hurts. Less infinite potential without Recursion.

Card Text: Whenever you play a Power, channel 1 Lightning.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play a Power, channel 1 Lightning.
Notes: Power spam = Lightning. No Heat Sinks hurts. Very situational.

Card Text: Deal 7 damage. Draw 4 cards. Discard all non-0-cost cards drawn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Draw 4 cards. Discard all non-0-cost cards drawn.
Notes: Can scrape away your Echo Form. Paradox - need 0-cost to pick but can't pick first.

Card Text: Deal 4 damage three times. Add a Slime to discard.
Upgraded Text: Deal 5 damage three times. Add a Slime to discard.
Notes: 12 damage but Slime hurts. Ball Lightning is better. Don't pick.

Card Text: First 0-cost attack each turn returns to hand.
Upgraded Text: Costs 1. First 0-cost attack each turn returns to hand.
Notes: Echo Form for 0-costs. But why double 0-cost over real cards? Claw only.

Card Text: Channel 1 random orb.
Upgraded Text: Channel 2 random orbs.
Notes: Random orbs bad. Other cards do orb + something. Never pick.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage twice. Play random attack from draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage twice. Play random attack from draw pile.
Notes: Random attack usually Strike. Weird energy cheat. Skip.

Card Text: Channel 2 Dark. At end of turn, evoke leftmost orb.
Upgraded Text: Channel 3 Dark. At end of turn, evoke leftmost orb.
Notes: Awkward. Eats orbs you want to keep. Hard to use.

Card Text: Deal 3 damage per energy spent this turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 4 damage per energy spent this turn.
Notes: Usually 9 damage. Rare slot for this? Pinpoint does 17. Skip.

Card Text: Gain 6 Block. Add a Daze to discard.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block. Add a Daze to discard.
Notes: Block but Daze hurts draws. Status synergy only.

Card Text: Whenever you create a status, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you create a status, deal 7 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Need status spam. How often do you create statuses? Skip.

Card Text: Whenever you create a status, channel 1 random orb.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you create a status, channel 2 random orbs.
Notes: Status → random orb. Don't want random orbs. Skip.

Card Text: ALL players gain [energy:2].
Notes: NEW - energy generation

Card Text: Another player [gold]Channels[/gold] [gold]Plasma[/gold].
Notes: NEW - needs evaluation
